zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert de Haydock I於大約1225年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾海多可時，他的父親Hugh de Haydock36歲，母親Cecelia de Lauton32歲。他於1242年與Alicia de Bold在英國英格蘭藍卡爾波爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1299年在英國藍卡爾海多可享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert de Haydock I于大约1225年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾海多可时，他的父亲Hugh de Haydock36岁，母亲Cecelia de Lauton32岁。他于1242年与Alicia de Bold在英国英格兰藍卡爾波爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1299年在英国藍卡爾海多可享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Haydock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Czech or Polish Hejduk , Polish, Slovak, Rusyn (from Slovakia and Poland), or Czech Hajduk , and of their Hungarian cognate Hajdók. Compare Hydock .

variants.name: Haddock
meanings: variant of the Lancashire surname Haydock , a habitational name from a place so called near Liverpool, which is probably named from Welsh heiddog ‘characterized by barley’.
from the Middle English personal name Addoc, a pet form of Old English Æddi (itself perhaps derived from one of the names in ēad ‘wealth, prosperity’), with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert de Haydock I was born about 1225, in Haydock, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh de Haydock, was 36 and his mother, Cecelia de Lauton, was 32. He married Alicia de Bold in 1242, in Bold, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1299, in Haydock, Lancashire, England, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert de Haydock I est né environ 1225, à Haydock, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh de Haydock, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Cecelia de Lauton, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Alicia de Bold en 1242, à Bold, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1299, à Haydock, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert de Haydock I um 1225 in Haydock, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Haydock 36 und seine Mutter Cecelia de Lauton 32. Er hat 1242 in Bold, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Alicia de Bold geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1299 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Haydock, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Haydock Iが約1225年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアヘイドックで生まれた時，父Hugh de Haydockは36歳，母Cecelia de Lautonは32歳であった。1242年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアボルドでAlicia de Boldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1299年にイギリスランカシュアイアヘイドックで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Haydock I(이)가 대략 1225년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 헤이독에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Haydock(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecelia de Lauton(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1242년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 볼드에서 Alicia de Bold(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1299년 영국 랭카실르 헤이독에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert de Haydock I родился около 1225 г. в местности хеидокк, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh de Haydock было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecelia de Lauton, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Alicia de Bold в 1242 г. в местности болд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1299 г. в местности хеидокк, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет.
